summary: The diff implements floating bottom navigation redesign across PatientAppLayout.tsx and StaffAppLayout.tsx with CSS-based frosted glass, fixed positioning, safe area insets, gradient active tab styling, and role-based nav items. Most requirements are partially or fully addressed, but several specific acceptance criteria have gaps or are implemented differently than specified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Apply a frosted-glass background using a BlurView component (intensity 60–80, tint: 'light'). Shadow must use shadowOpacity: 0.08, shadowRadius: 12, shadowOffset: { width: 0, height: 6 }, elevation: 10 for Android.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff uses CSS backdropFilter: 'blur(20px)' and boxShadow instead of a BlurView component. This is a web CSS approach, not the React Native BlurView component specified. The shadow is implemented as boxShadow rather than explicit shadowColor/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius/shadowOffset/elevation properties. There is no elevation: 10 for Android present in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Active tab animates to scale 1.05–1.1 when selected; smooth transition animation when switching tabs.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff does not show any explicit scale transform animation on the active tab button. No transition animation for switching tabs is visible in the truncated diff. Scale animation code is absent from the visible portions of the layout files.

hallucinated_features.description: Dark mode floating nav styles with dark background rgba(18,22,40,0.92) and adjusted border and shadow variables.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only specifies a light frosted-glass nav (tint: 'light', rgba(255,255,255,0.9) fallback). Dark mode nav variables were added in index.css but were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: CSS custom properties (--nav-blur, --nav-bg, --nav-border, --nav-shadow, --nav-radius, --nav-bottom-margin, --nav-side-margin) added as design tokens in :root.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention adding CSS custom properties or design tokens for nav values; it specifies direct style values. These tokens are additional implementation detail not requested.
